steps.title: Spot the numbered sequence
steps.content: The passage announces “three basic steps” and explicitly labels them with “First” and “Third.” The decisive clue is the ordinal numbering that must continue through the blank.

steps.title: Complete the sequence
steps.content: “Second,” completes the numbered sequence the passage establishes with “First” and “Third.” The other choices signal different kinds of transitions—consequence, contrast, illustration—that don't continue this numbering. That is the correct answer.
